name: Daily Briefing
description: Safe example workflow for planning a daily briefing from user-provided context.

include_notify.description: Whether to include a final notification checkpoint.

steps.name: Plan briefing
steps.description: Create a concise plan for the briefing.
steps.prompt: Plan a concise daily briefing for the requested topic. Do not call tools or write files.

steps.name: Check notification preference
steps.description: Continue only when the caller wants a notification checkpoint.

steps.name: Notify ready
steps.description: Record that the briefing plan is ready.

steps.name: Summarize expected artifact
steps.description: Ledger-only checkpoint for the expected briefing summary.
